narrative: Individual checking account onboarding. CIP 4 elements collected: name, DOB (1985-07-12), residential address verified via utility bill, TIN (SSN) matched. Identity verification via Knowledge-Based Authentication + driver license barcode scan + selfie match. OFAC SDN screening clear; non-SDN sanctions list clear; PEP check clear; adverse media check clear. Beneficial ownership N/A (individual account). Risk rating: low (US resident, retail product, low geography risk). Source of funds documented as employment income. Ongoing transaction monitoring enrolled. Periodic refresh scheduled annually.
